attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE),
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY                            AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE,0)  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
  *COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
AS DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,
CAST(
CASE WHEN NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NPPT.BASE_PRICE IS NOT NULL THEN 
     CAST((NPPT.BASE_PRICE/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1)END)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
	  WHEN NPPTB.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL AND NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN Cast(NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(18,6)) /*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
	  WHEN NP.RU_SBSCRPTN_OFFR_TYPE_CD='Success_Track_Sub' and NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT>1 and NPPTB.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND
			                       NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL   
			         THEN 
				          Cast(NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT/ Coalesce(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
ELSE 
     CAST((COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0.000000)/
			(CASE WHEN NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
			OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
			THEN 1 
             ELSE COALESCE(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))
	 *(COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) )AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
END  
*CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='AMORTIZED ONE TIME' 
	  THEN CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))
 ELSE 
	  CAST(CAST(CASE WHEN NSOL.TRX_SS_CD='AR' THEN
					                             CASE  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='MONTHLY BILLING' THEN 1
												       WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='ANNUAL BILLING' THEN 12
													   WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='QUARTERLY BILLING' THEN 3
													   WHEN COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') IN ('PREPAID TERM','UNKNOWN') THEN 
													     CASE WHEN NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT IN(-999,0) 
														 OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
														 THEN 1 ELSE NSOL. INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END
												 END
					WHEN NSOL.TRX_SS_CD='MANUAL' THEN 1 
				ELSE
					CASE WHEN BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT=0 
					OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					THEN CASE WHEN NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT IN
					(-999,0) THEN 1 ELSE NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END ELSE 
					CASE WHEN NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN 1 ELSE/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT  END END
				END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
   END * CAST( NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0.000000)*COALESCE(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT  ,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END ,'=')     AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END ,'=') AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END  ,'=') AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLAG,
NSOL.CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG                AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
NSOL.IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG                     AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
COALESCE(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)                   AS DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY                            AS DD_NCB_INVOICED_QTY_AMT,
CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                            AS DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT,
NSOL.SS_CODE                                      AS DD_NCB_SS_CD,
CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                            AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,   
NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY                               AS DD_NCB_ORDER_QTY,
CAST(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS DATE) AS DD_NCB_PROMISED_CUST_SHIP_DT,
NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                         AS DD_NCB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,                
CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DD_NCB_SO_LINE_SOURCE_CRT_DTM,
NSOL.ORDER_STATUS                                 AS DV_NCB_ORDER_STATUS_CD,
NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE               AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                   AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
USER                                              AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                              AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                                              AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                              AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))  
	                                              AS CONVERSION_RT,
NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME                               AS ORDER_DTM,               
NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                  AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'XAAS'                                            AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
-999											  AS ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY,
-999											  AS XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY,
'N' 											  AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG,
'N' 											  AS HISTORY_FLG,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 						  AS DV_ORIG_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT
FROM
(
       SELECT
                 NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY         AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
       CASE
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=0 THEN  'ENTERED'
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=1 THEN  'CFS HOLD'
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=2 THEN  'AUTODISCOUNT HOLD'
       ELSE   'BOTH'
       END                                     		      AS ORDER_STATUS,
       COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUM(NSOL.CFS_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END ,'=')                                            	  
										                  AS CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG,
       COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUM(NSOL.IC_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ,'=')                                            	  
														  AS IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
       MAX(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)           		  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)                          AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY)                           AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
       MAX(NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE)    					  AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
       MAX(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)         					  AS PRODUCT_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY)                        AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
       MAX(NSOL.SS_CODE)                                  AS SS_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE)           AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
       MAX(NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)                     AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)                   AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
       MAX(NSOL.BOOKINGS_PERCENT)                         AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)           AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.PRICING_DATETIME)                         AS PRICING_DATETIME,
       MAX(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)                          AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
       MAX(NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE)              AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE)                     AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO)            	  AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
       MAX(NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME)  						  AS ORDER_DATETIME,
       MAX(NSOL.CANCELLED_FLAG)  						  AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)                       AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
       MAX(NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE)                 AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT)                  AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME)                       AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT)                       AS BK_VERSION_NUM_INT,
	   MAX(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT)                    AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
	   MAX(NSOL.TRX_SS_CD) 				                  AS TRX_SS_CD ,
	   MAX(NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT)                AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
	   MAX(NSOL.SK_TRX_ID_INT)                            AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
       MAX(NSOL.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)                      AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
	   NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD                  AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
	   FROM(
            SELECT  
              NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY               AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                                                         0     AS ORDER_STATUS,
														 0     AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
                                                         0     AS IC_FLAG_STATUS,
              /*COALESCE((CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
                               WHEN (LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' and 
                                     LINEHOLD.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT='Discount validation required') THEN 2
                         ELSE 0END),0)                AS ORDER_STATUS,
              COALESCE((CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
                        ELSE 0 END),0)                AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
              COALESCE((CASE WHEN (LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' and 
                                   LINEHOLD.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT='Discount validation required') THEN 1
                        ELSE 0 END),0)  AS IC_FLAG_STATUS*/
              NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                            AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
              NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                             AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
              NXSO.SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT                        AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
              NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY                    AS PRODUCT_KEY,
              NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                             AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
              NSOLT.SS_CODE                                    AS SS_CODE,             
              NSOLT.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE             AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
              NXSO.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY               AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
              NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                     AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
              NXSO.BOOKING_PCT                                 AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
              NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE             AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
              NSOLT.PRICING_DATETIME                           AS PRICING_DATETIME,
              NXSO.LIST_PRICE                                  AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
              NXSO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD                         AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
              NSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                         AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
              NSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                       AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
              NXSO.ORDER_CREATED_DT                            AS ORDER_DATETIME,
              CASE WHEN NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
														       AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
              NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME                           AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
              NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE                     AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
              NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
              NXSO.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT                     AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
              NXSO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME                          AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
              NXSO.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT                          AS BK_VERSION_NUM_INT,
			  NXSO.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT                       AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
			  NXSO.TRX_SS_CD								   AS TRX_SS_CD,
			  NXSO.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT                   AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
			  NXSO.SK_TRX_ID_INT                               AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
			  NXSO.BOOKING_VERSION_INT                         AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
			  NXSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD             AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
              FROM 
				(SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV 
				WHERE END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND
				ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
				INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
				ON  NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
				ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
				AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
				AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 
				WHERE NSOLT.SS_CODE IN ('OPL')
               
			   /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN
               $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SALES_ORDER_LN_HOLD_ACTIVE LINEHOLD
               ON(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=LINEHOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)*/
 
        ) NSOL
       
	   GROUP BY NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
)NSOL

CROSS JOIN
(
SELECT
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
$$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
WHERE
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
) FMNI

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY )

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON (NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME
AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='CORPORATE')

/*
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCDR
               ON (NCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = W_DRVD_XAAS.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD           
            AND NCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
               AND NCDR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE = NXSSIS.ORDER_CREATED_DT )*/


/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPTB 
ON (NPPTB.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)
 AND NPPTB.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List' 
 AND NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME BETWEEN NPPTB.START_TV_DATE 
 AND NPPTB. END_TV_DATE  
/*AND NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'*/ 
/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_MODEL,TRX_ID,TRX_VERSION,PLAN_NAME  FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_BOOKING_TRANSACTIONS XBT
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL SOL ON SOL.LINE_ID=CAST(XBT.LINE_ID AS BIGINT)) SOL
ON (SOL.TRX_ID=NSOL.SK_TRX_ID_INT AND SOL.TRX_VERSION=NSOL.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT
ON  NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY =NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY  
AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = NSOL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
AND NPPT.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=NSOL.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT
AND NPPT.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'RATE TABLE' 
AND NPPT.PLAN_TYPE_NM = COALESCE(SOL.PLAN_NAME ,'UNKNOWN')			--Grogu Changes

INNER JOIN
(
SELECT 
NSOLT.ORDER_CREATED_DT                AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,  
NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY        AS PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOLT.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY   AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY     AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT              AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
FROM (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV 
      WHERE END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'CLOUD-CBM')NSOLT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST NSC
ON( NSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
AND NSC.ITEM_KEY = NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
AND NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= NSOLT.ORDER_CREATED_DT) 

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY /* PRODCU_KEY NEED TO BE CHANGED AS SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY*/
ORDER BY NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC )=1) NSC
ON(NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NSC.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY)

WHERE CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE) <= FMNI.PROCESS_DATE  /* NCB Cut off Deployment */

SELECT
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE),
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY                            AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE,0)  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
  *COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
AS DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,
CAST(
CASE WHEN NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NPPT.BASE_PRICE IS NOT NULL THEN 
     CAST((NPPT.BASE_PRICE/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1)END)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
	  WHEN NPPTB.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL THEN Cast(NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(18,6)) /*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
ELSE 
     CAST((COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0.000000)/
			(CASE WHEN NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
			OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
			THEN 1 
             ELSE COALESCE(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))
	 *(COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) )AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
END  
*CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='AMORTIZED ONE TIME' 
	  THEN CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))
 ELSE 
	  CAST(CAST(CASE WHEN NSOL.TRX_SS_CD='AR' THEN
					                             CASE  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='MONTHLY BILLING' THEN 1
												       WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='ANNUAL BILLING' THEN 12
													   WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='QUARTERLY BILLING' THEN 3
													   WHEN COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') IN ('PREPAID TERM','UNKNOWN') THEN 
													     CASE WHEN NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT IN(-999,0) 
														 OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
														 THEN 1 ELSE NSOL. INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END
												 END
					WHEN NSOL.TRX_SS_CD='MANUAL' THEN 1 
				ELSE
					CASE WHEN BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT=0 
					OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					THEN CASE WHEN NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT IN
					(-999,0) THEN 1 ELSE NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END ELSE 
					CASE WHEN NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN 1 ELSE/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT  END END
				END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
   END * CAST( NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT ,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0.000000)*COALESCE(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT  ,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END ,'=')     AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END ,'=') AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
COALESCE(CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END  ,'=') AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLAG,
NSOL.CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG                AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
NSOL.IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG                     AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
COALESCE(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)                   AS DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY                            AS DD_NCB_INVOICED_QTY_AMT,
NSOL.DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT,
NSOL.SS_CODE                                      AS DD_NCB_SS_CD,
NSOL.DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,   
NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY                               AS DD_NCB_ORDER_QTY,
CAST(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS DATE) AS DD_NCB_PROMISED_CUST_SHIP_DT,
NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                         AS DD_NCB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,                
CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DD_NCB_SO_LINE_SOURCE_CRT_DTM,
NSOL.ORDER_STATUS                                 AS DV_NCB_ORDER_STATUS_CD,
NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE               AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                   AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
USER                                              AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                              AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                                              AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                              AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))  
	                                              AS CONVERSION_RT,
NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME                               AS ORDER_DTM,               
NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                  AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'ERP'                                            AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
-999											  AS ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY,
-999											  AS XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY,
'N' 											  AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG,
'N' 											  AS HISTORY_FLG,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 						  AS DV_ORIG_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT
FROM
(
       SELECT
                 NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY         AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
       CASE
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=0 THEN  'ENTERED'
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=1 THEN  'CFS HOLD'
              WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=2 THEN  'AUTODISCOUNT HOLD'
       ELSE   'BOTH'
       END                                     		      AS ORDER_STATUS,
       COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUM(NSOL.CFS_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END ,'=')                                            	  
										                  AS CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG,
       COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUM(NSOL.IC_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ,'=')                                            	  
														  AS IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
       MAX(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)           		  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)                          AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY)                           AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
       MAX(NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE)    					  AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
       MAX(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)         					  AS PRODUCT_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY)                        AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
	   MAX(NSOL.DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT)            AS DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT,
       MAX(NSOL.SS_CODE)                                  AS SS_CODE,
	   MAX(NSOL.DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT)            AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
       MAX(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE)           AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
       MAX(NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)                     AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)                   AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
       MAX(NSOL.BOOKINGS_PERCENT)                         AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)           AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.PRICING_DATETIME)                         AS PRICING_DATETIME,
       MAX(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)                          AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
       MAX(NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE)              AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE)                     AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO)            	  AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
       MAX(NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME)  						  AS ORDER_DATETIME,
       MAX(NSOL.CANCELLED_FLAG)  						  AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)                       AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
       MAX(NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE)                 AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
       MAX(NSOL.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT)                  AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME)                       AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
       MAX(NSOL.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT)                       AS BK_VERSION_NUM_INT,
	   MAX(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT)                    AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
	   MAX(NSOL.TRX_SS_CD) 				                  AS TRX_SS_CD ,
	   MAX(NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT)                AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
	   MAX(NSOL.SK_TRX_ID_INT)                            AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
       MAX(NSOL.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)                      AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
	   NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD                  AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
	   FROM(
            SELECT  
              NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY               AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                                                         0     AS ORDER_STATUS,
														 0     AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
                                                         0     AS IC_FLAG_STATUS,
              /*COALESCE((CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
                               WHEN (LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' and 
                                     LINEHOLD.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT='Discount validation required') THEN 2
                         ELSE 0END),0)                AS ORDER_STATUS,
              COALESCE((CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
                        ELSE 0 END),0)                AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
              COALESCE((CASE WHEN (LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' and 
                                   LINEHOLD.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT='Discount validation required') THEN 1
                        ELSE 0 END),0)  AS IC_FLAG_STATUS*/
              NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                            AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
              NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                             AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
              NXSO.SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT                        AS UNIT_SALE_PRICE,
              NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY                    AS PRODUCT_KEY,
              NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                             AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
			  NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT   			   	       AS DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT,
              NSOLT.SS_CODE                                    AS SS_CODE,  
			  NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT         		           AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
              NSOLT.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE             AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
              NXSO.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY               AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
              NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                     AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
              NXSO.BOOKING_PCT                                 AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
              NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE             AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
              NSOLT.PRICING_DATETIME                           AS PRICING_DATETIME,
              NXSO.LIST_PRICE                                  AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
              NXSO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD                         AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
              NSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                         AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
              NSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                       AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
              NXSO.ORDER_CREATED_DT                            AS ORDER_DATETIME,
              CASE WHEN NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
														       AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
              NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME                           AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
              NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE                     AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
              NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                 AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
              NXSO.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT                     AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
              NXSO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME                          AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
              NXSO.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT                          AS BK_VERSION_NUM_INT,
			  NXSO.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT                       AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
			  NXSO.TRX_SS_CD								   AS TRX_SS_CD,
			  NXSO.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT                   AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
			  NXSO.SK_TRX_ID_INT                               AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
			  NXSO.BOOKING_VERSION_INT                         AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
			  NXSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD             AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
              FROM 
				(SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV 
				WHERE END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
				INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
				ON  NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
				ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
				AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
				AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 
				WHERE NSOLT.SS_CODE IN ('OPL')
               
			   /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN
               $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SALES_ORDER_LN_HOLD_ACTIVE LINEHOLD
               ON(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=LINEHOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)*/
 
        ) NSOL
       
	   GROUP BY NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
)NSOL

CROSS JOIN
(
SELECT
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
$$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
WHERE
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
) FMNI

LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY )

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON (NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME
AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='CORPORATE')

/*
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCDR
               ON (NCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = W_DRVD_XAAS.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD           
            AND NCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
               AND NCDR.SK_CONVERSION_DATE = NXSSIS.ORDER_CREATED_DT )*/


/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPTB 
ON (NPPTB.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)
 AND NPPTB.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List' 
 AND NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME BETWEEN NPPTB.START_TV_DATE 
 AND NPPTB. END_TV_DATE AND 
NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'
/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_MODEL,TRX_ID,TRX_VERSION,PLAN_NAME  FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_BOOKING_TRANSACTIONS XBT
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL SOL ON SOL.LINE_ID=CAST(XBT.LINE_ID AS BIGINT)) SOL
ON (SOL.TRX_ID=NSOL.SK_TRX_ID_INT AND SOL.TRX_VERSION=NSOL.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT
ON  NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY =NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY  
AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = NSOL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
AND NPPT.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=NSOL.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT
AND NPPT.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'RATE TABLE' 
AND NPPT.PLAN_TYPE_NM = coalesce(SOL.PLAN_NAME ,'UNKNOWN')			--Grogu Changes

INNER JOIN
(
SELECT 
NSOLT.ORDER_CREATED_DT                AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,  
NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY        AS PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOLT.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY   AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY     AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT              AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
FROM (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV 
      WHERE END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM')NSOLT

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST NSC
ON( NSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
AND NSC.ITEM_KEY = NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
AND NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= NSOLT.ORDER_CREATED_DT) 

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY /* PRODCU_KEY NEED TO BE CHANGED AS SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY*/
ORDER BY NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC )=1) NSC
ON(NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NSC.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY)

WHERE CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE) <= FMNI.PROCESS_DATE  /* NCB Cut off Deployment */
